stages.label: Stage 0
stages.title: Stage 0: Raw Data Download
stages.description: Download raw survey data from Census, IRS, Federal Reserve, and HuggingFace

nodes.label: Census CPS ASEC
nodes.description: ZIP with CSV files from www2.census.gov

nodes.label: Federal Reserve SCF
nodes.description: Stata format (.dta), Survey of Consumer Finances

nodes.label: HTTP Download + ZIP Extract
nodes.description: requests.get() with streaming, tqdm progress bar

nodes.label: census_cps_2024.h5
nodes.description: 5 entity tables: Person, Family, Household, Tax Unit, SPM Unit

nodes.label: SCF raw data
nodes.description: Stata → DataFrame, auto loans + net worth

stages.label: Stage 1
stages.title: Stage 1: Base Dataset Construction
stages.description: Build CPS 2024 and PUF 2024 from raw survey data

nodes.label: census_cps_2023.h5
nodes.description: Previous year CPS for income matching

nodes.label: SCF 2022
nodes.description: Training data for auto loans QRF

nodes.label: Rent Imputation (QRF)
nodes.description: Impute rent and real estate taxes using QRF from ACS 2022
nodes.details: 10K sampled household heads as training data

nodes.label: Impute PUF Demographics
nodes.description: QRF imputation for age, gender, and earnings split

nodes.label: SSN Card Type
nodes.description: US immigration classification from 14 ASEC conditions

nodes.label: Add Personal Variables
nodes.description: Age, sex, disability, occupation, overtime flags
nodes.details: 80+ ages randomized to 80-84; 12 overtime occupation flags

nodes.label: Add ID Variables
nodes.description: Create person_id, household_id, tax_unit_id, spm_unit_id, marital_unit_id

nodes.label: Tips Imputation (QRF)
nodes.description: Impute tip income and liquid assets from SIPP 2023
nodes.details: Models cached as pickle; QRF fit_predict()

nodes.label: Auto Loan / Net Worth (QRF)
nodes.description: Impute auto loan balance, interest, and net worth from SCF 2022

nodes.label: QBI Simulation
nodes.description: Simulate W-2 wages, UBIA, and SSTB for Section 199A

nodes.label: SPM Variables
nodes.description: SPM thresholds and transfers (SNAP, housing, energy subsidies)

nodes.label: Preprocess PUF
nodes.description: Rename 60+ IRS variables to PolicyEngine names

nodes.label: Add Income Variables
nodes.details: SS classified by reason codes; retirement split by account type; capital gains 88% LT / 12% ST

nodes.label: Previous Year Income
nodes.description: Cross-year PERIDNUM linking for prior-year income

nodes.label: Household Variables
nodes.description: State FIPS, county FIPS, NYC flag from county codes

nodes.label: Benefit Takeup
nodes.details: SNAP, ACA, Medicaid, EITC, SSI, TANF, WIC, Head Start; state-specific Medicaid rates

stages.label: Stage 2
stages.title: Stage 2: Extended CPS (PUF Clone)
stages.description: Merge CPS + PUF via cloning, impute 64 income vars + 51 override vars via QRF

nodes.label: Record Doubling
nodes.description: puf_clone_dataset() — CPS half keeps originals, PUF half starts with zero weight

nodes.label: QRF Pass 1: Full Imputation
nodes.description: 64 income variables — training on PUF ~20K records, 7 demographic predictors

nodes.label: QRF Pass 2: Override Imputation
nodes.description: 51 variables (both halves) — partnership, S-corp, charitable, mortgage, credits

nodes.label: Retirement Contribution Imputation
nodes.description: 401k, IRA, SE pension — IRS limits + catch-up applied

nodes.label: Weeks Unemployed Imputation
nodes.description: QRF on CPS weeks_unemployed — clips [0, 52], zero if no UC

nodes.label: CPS-Only Variable Re-imputation
nodes.description: 80 variables for PUF half — transfers, SPM, medical, hours, retirement

nodes.label: Formula Variable Dropping
nodes.description: Remove PE-computed variables, rename employment_income → employment_income_before_lsr

stages.label: Stage 3
stages.title: Stage 3: Stratified CPS + Enhanced CPS Reweighting
stages.description: Stratify by income (keep top 1%), reweight to match calibration targets

nodes.label: Retain Top 1% by AGI
nodes.description: All high-income households kept — preserves tail representation

nodes.label: Uniform Sample Remaining 99%
nodes.description: Target: ~12,000 households — optional 1.5x oversample of bottom 25%

nodes.label: build_loss_matrix()
nodes.description: Hundreds of calibration targets — returns (matrix, target_vector)

nodes.label: IRS SOI
nodes.description: AGI, income types, filer counts by AGI band / filing status

nodes.label: CBO Budget
nodes.description: Income tax, SNAP, SS, SSI, UC

nodes.label: State Targets
nodes.description: 50 states + DC — population, AGI, ACA, SNAP, age groups

nodes.label: reweight()
nodes.description: PyTorch Adam + L0 HardConcrete — 500 epochs, lr=0.2

nodes.label: Weight Validation
nodes.description: No NaN, no negatives — 100M < total HH < 200M

stages.label: Stage 4
stages.title: Stage 4: Source Imputation (ACS + SIPP + SCF)
stages.description: Impute wealth/assets from external surveys onto stratified CPS via QRF

nodes.label: ACS_2022
nodes.description: American Community Survey — has state_fips predictor

nodes.label: SCF_2022
nodes.description: Survey of Consumer Finances — 50% random subsample

nodes.label: ACS QRF Imputation
nodes.description: 10 predictors incl. state_fips — imputes rent, real_estate_taxes

nodes.label: source_imputed_stratified_extended_cps.h5
nodes.description: Enriched with ACS/SIPP/SCF vars — uploaded to HuggingFace

stages.label: Stage 5
stages.title: Stage 5: Matrix Build (Calibration Target Construction)
stages.description: Build sparse calibration matrix (targets × households × clones)

nodes.label: Target Resolution
nodes.description: SQL query to target_overview — ~8,000 rows total

nodes.label: Target Uprating
nodes.description: CPI-U for dollars, pop growth for counts

nodes.label: Constraint Resolution
nodes.description: Non-geographic constraints from DB (age, medicaid, filer)

nodes.label: Block-Level Takeup Re-randomization
nodes.description: Seeded on (block_geoid, hh_id) — ensures calibration consistency

nodes.label: Sparse Matrix Construction
nodes.description: COO triples → CSR matrix — shape (n_targets, 5.16M), ~0.02% nonzero

nodes.label: calibration_package.pkl
nodes.description: X_sparse CSR matrix, targets_df, initial_weights, metadata

stages.label: Stage 6
stages.title: Stage 6: Weight Fitting (L0 Calibration)
stages.description: Fit log-weights using L0 HardConcrete gates on GPU

nodes.label: Modal GPU Container
nodes.description: T4 / A10 / A100 / H100 — 32GB RAM, 8 CPU

nodes.label: model.fit()
nodes.description: Adam optimizer — loss = RSE + λ₀·L0(w) + λ₂·‖w‖²

nodes.label: Extract Weights
nodes.description: Deterministic gate threshold — produces exact zeros

stages.label: Stage 7
stages.title: Stage 7: Local Area H5 Build
stages.description: Build 51 state + 435 district + 1 city H5 files on Modal workers

nodes.label: Partition Work
nodes.description: 50 workers — weights: state by CD count, city=11, district=1

nodes.label: Phase 1: States
nodes.description: 51 state H5 files (50 + DC) — workers in parallel

nodes.label: Phase 2: Districts
nodes.description: ~435 congressional district H5 files — workers in parallel

nodes.label: Phase 3: Cities
nodes.description: NYC (5 counties, 13 CDs) — city probability filtering

nodes.label: build_h5() — Core Logic
nodes.description: 18-step H5 construction — load, reshape, filter, clone, derive geo, SPM, takeup, write

nodes.label: SPM Threshold Recalculation
nodes.description: Local median rents, family composition, tenure type

nodes.label: manifest.json
nodes.description: SHA256 checksums for all H5 files

stages.label: Stage 8
stages.title: Stage 8: Validation & Promotion
stages.description: 7-layer validation, staging upload, atomic promotion to production

nodes.label: Layer 1: Manifest Verification
nodes.description: SHA256 checksums per file — catches corruption

nodes.label: Layer 2: Structural Sanity
nodes.description: Weight non-negativity, entity ID uniqueness, no NaN/Inf, mapping integrity

nodes.label: Layer 3: Target-Based Validation
nodes.description: Full Microsimulation per area — compare sim values to targets

nodes.label: Layer 4: Smoke Test
nodes.description: Sum 20 key vars across 51 states — GDP ~$29T, pop ~335M

nodes.label: Layer 6: Pre-Upload Validation
nodes.description: File size minimums (100MB/50MB), H5 structure, Microsim aggregates

nodes.label: Layer 7: Package Validation
nodes.description: Matrix achievability, target ratio analysis, zero-row detection

nodes.label: GCS Parallel Upload
nodes.description: gs://policyengine-us-data/ — version metadata on each blob
